title: gratiola nana
intro: Gratiola nana, also known as dwarf bitterwort, is a small, annual plant belonging to the mint family, native to North America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Gratiola nana include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and even exhibit antimicrobial properties. Gratiola nana can be prepared as a herbal remedy through teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a popular choice for natural health remedies.
